sections.paragraph: m. quadrilitt. darkness of clouds, thick clouds, Exo 20:21 Deu 4:11 1Ki 8:12 Psa 18:10. Syr. ܥܰܪܦܶܠܳ id., ܐܬܶܥܰܪܦܰܠ to make dark. Blended apparently from the triliterals עָרִיף a cloud, and אָפַל to be dark. To this corresponds the Greek ὀρφνός, obscure, dark, ὄρφνη, darkness, especially of the night.
